name: Good
descr: Minor wear and tear. No significant structural defects. Normal monitoring adequate.

name: Fair
descr: Moderate deterioration. Some defects present but not immediately critical. Attention required.

name: Poor
descr: Significant defects. Structural integrity attention required. Active management needed.

name: Very Poor
descr: Major defects. Urgent repairs required. Possible load restrictions warranted.

name: Critical
descr: Imminent failure risk or structural failure possible. Immediate action required.
